cases.title: Representative approved workflow completes end to end
cases.setup: Use a valid representative fixture covering the primary responsibilities of the target Batch. Batch theme: Unified intermediate representation and source mapping.
cases.stimulus: Execute the Batch orchestrator or representative target Skills with approved inputs. Exercise at least one orchestrating Skill and all directly affected target Skills.
cases.expected: All mandatory outputs validate, trace to inputs, and contain no hidden warnings or unsupported claims. Required Batch-specific contracts for Unified intermediate representation and source mapping remain satisfied.
cases.deterministic_oracle: Use schema/parser validation, stable identifiers, stored baseline comparison, explicit state/permission checks, content hashes and recorded runner/tool exit status. LLM interpretation may explain a finding but cannot determine raw pass/fail facts.
required_evidence: Artifact Graph or trace links where applicable
cases.timeout_policy: Use the target Batch budget; timeouts are failures unless the case explicitly validates timeout handling.
cases.retry_policy: At most one infrastructure-only rerun; product failures cannot be erased by rerun.

cases.title: Boundary and moderate scale remain correct
cases.setup: Use minimum/maximum supported sizes, empty optional collections, and a moderately large realistic fixture. Batch theme: Unified intermediate representation and source mapping.
cases.stimulus: Execute the same workflow at declared boundaries and at 2x the normal reference volume. Exercise at least one orchestrating Skill and all directly affected target Skills.
cases.expected: Behavior remains bounded; limits are explicit; no silent truncation, quadratic blow-up, or inconsistent result occurs. Required Batch-specific contracts for Unified intermediate representation and source mapping remain satisfied.
cases.deterministic_oracle: Use schema/parser validation, stable identifiers, stored baseline comparison, explicit state/permission checks, content hashes and recorded runner/tool exit status. LLM interpretation may explain a finding but cannot determine raw pass/fail facts.
required_evidence: Artifact Graph or trace links where applicable
cases.timeout_policy: Use the target Batch budget; timeouts are failures unless the case explicitly validates timeout handling.
cases.retry_policy: At most one infrastructure-only rerun; product failures cannot be erased by rerun.

cases.title: Malformed or contradictory input fails safely
cases.setup: Corrupt one required field, introduce one invalid reference, and add one contradictory constraint. Batch theme: Unified intermediate representation and source mapping.
cases.stimulus: Submit the malformed fixture without granting an exception. Exercise at least one orchestrating Skill and all directly affected target Skills.
cases.expected: The workflow rejects or blocks with a structured diagnostic and makes no authoritative partial success claim. Required Batch-specific contracts for Unified intermediate representation and source mapping remain satisfied.
cases.deterministic_oracle: Use schema/parser validation, stable identifiers, stored baseline comparison, explicit state/permission checks, content hashes and recorded runner/tool exit status. LLM interpretation may explain a finding but cannot determine raw pass/fail facts.
required_evidence: Artifact Graph or trace links where applicable
cases.timeout_policy: Use the target Batch budget; timeouts are failures unless the case explicitly validates timeout handling.
cases.retry_policy: At most one infrastructure-only rerun; product failures cannot be erased by rerun.

cases.title: Dependency failure is contained and recoverable
cases.setup: Make one required provider, registry, model, runner, database, broker, or external dependency unavailable. Batch theme: Unified intermediate representation and source mapping.
cases.stimulus: Execute until the failure is reached, then restore the dependency and resume where supported. Exercise at least one orchestrating Skill and all directly affected target Skills.
cases.expected: Failure classification is correct, partial writes are journaled, retry is bounded, and resume does not duplicate side effects. Required Batch-specific contracts for Unified intermediate representation and source mapping remain satisfied.
cases.deterministic_oracle: Use schema/parser validation, stable identifiers, stored baseline comparison, explicit state/permission checks, content hashes and recorded runner/tool exit status. LLM interpretation may explain a finding but cannot determine raw pass/fail facts.
required_evidence: Artifact Graph or trace links where applicable
cases.timeout_policy: Use the target Batch budget; timeouts are failures unless the case explicitly validates timeout handling.
cases.retry_policy: At most one infrastructure-only rerun; product failures cannot be erased by rerun.

cases.title: Security, tenant and permission boundaries cannot be bypassed
cases.setup: Create two tenants/projects and an actor lacking one required permission; include a malicious embedded instruction. Batch theme: Unified intermediate representation and source mapping.
cases.stimulus: Attempt cross-boundary reads/writes, privilege escalation, and prompt-injection-driven tool use. Exercise at least one orchestrating Skill and all directly affected target Skills.
cases.expected: All attempts are denied; no sensitive data leaks; the malicious instruction is treated as untrusted content and audited. Required Batch-specific contracts for Unified intermediate representation and source mapping remain satisfied.
cases.deterministic_oracle: Use schema/parser validation, stable identifiers, stored baseline comparison, explicit state/permission checks, content hashes and recorded runner/tool exit status. LLM interpretation may explain a finding but cannot determine raw pass/fail facts.
required_evidence: Artifact Graph or trace links where applicable
cases.timeout_policy: Use the target Batch budget; timeouts are failures unless the case explicitly validates timeout handling.
cases.retry_policy: At most one infrastructure-only rerun; product failures cannot be erased by rerun.

cases.title: Replay and retry are idempotent
cases.setup: Capture an accepted request, event, generation unit, migration step, or task with its idempotency identity. Batch theme: Unified intermediate representation and source mapping.
cases.stimulus: Replay it twice, including once after an injected timeout where the original completion status is initially unknown. Exercise at least one orchestrating Skill and all directly affected target Skills.
cases.expected: No duplicate semantic object or side effect is produced; the original result or safe reconciliation is returned. Required Batch-specific contracts for Unified intermediate representation and source mapping remain satisfied.
cases.deterministic_oracle: Use schema/parser validation, stable identifiers, stored baseline comparison, explicit state/permission checks, content hashes and recorded runner/tool exit status. LLM interpretation may explain a finding but cannot determine raw pass/fail facts.
required_evidence: Artifact Graph or trace links where applicable
cases.timeout_policy: Use the target Batch budget; timeouts are failures unless the case explicitly validates timeout handling.
cases.retry_policy: At most one infrastructure-only rerun; product failures cannot be erased by rerun.

cases.title: Schema, runtime and dependency drift is detected
cases.setup: Change one upstream schema or tool version compatibly and one incompatibly. Batch theme: Unified intermediate representation and source mapping.
cases.stimulus: Run compatibility resolution and the target workflow against both revisions. Exercise at least one orchestrating Skill and all directly affected target Skills.
cases.expected: Compatible evolution succeeds with evidence; incompatible evolution blocks with precise impact and migration guidance. Required Batch-specific contracts for Unified intermediate representation and source mapping remain satisfied.
cases.deterministic_oracle: Use schema/parser validation, stable identifiers, stored baseline comparison, explicit state/permission checks, content hashes and recorded runner/tool exit status. LLM interpretation may explain a finding but cannot determine raw pass/fail facts.
required_evidence: Artifact Graph or trace links where applicable
cases.timeout_policy: Use the target Batch budget; timeouts are failures unless the case explicitly validates timeout handling.
cases.retry_policy: At most one infrastructure-only rerun; product failures cannot be erased by rerun.

cases.title: Tampered or incomplete evidence cannot produce a pass
cases.setup: Remove one required evidence record and alter one stored output fingerprint. Batch theme: Unified intermediate representation and source mapping.
cases.stimulus: Evaluate the run and attempt to publish a success or certification result. Exercise at least one orchestrating Skill and all directly affected target Skills.
cases.expected: Hash/signature or completeness checks fail and release remains blocked; no score averaging can hide the defect. Required Batch-specific contracts for Unified intermediate representation and source mapping remain satisfied.
cases.deterministic_oracle: Use schema/parser validation, stable identifiers, stored baseline comparison, explicit state/permission checks, content hashes and recorded runner/tool exit status. LLM interpretation may explain a finding but cannot determine raw pass/fail facts.
required_evidence: Artifact Graph or trace links where applicable
cases.timeout_policy: Use the target Batch budget; timeouts are failures unless the case explicitly validates timeout handling.
cases.retry_policy: At most one infrastructure-only rerun; product failures cannot be erased by rerun.
